subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, sent down in truth from God, the Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Choosing, and they give glad tidings unto them that have recognized His unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب نزلت بالحق من لدی الله المقتدر العزیز المختار و یبشر الموحدین الی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
